case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC VS. HELEN LEE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, HELEN $10,807.36 PRINCIPAL, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,237.76 INTEREST, $390.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,860.12, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HELEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-02-2010
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $586.08 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC SERVED JUN-07-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HELEN
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HELEN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
